visual_description: A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue robe over a checkered shirt, is partially visible behind a damaged wall panel. She holds a large knife in her right hand and presses her left hand against the wall, her head tilted back and eyes wide open. Her posture is tense and she appears to be looking upward while gripping the knife with both hands.
